name: Best Bagels Ever
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the yeast proof in water for 5 minutes.
2. Mix the yeast with honey, salt, and flour until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it is smooth and elastic.
4. Cover the dough and let it rise for 15 minutes.
5. Pat the dough into a rectangular slab about 1/2" thick.
6. Cut the dough into strips.
7. Join the ends of each strip together to form bagels.
8. Let the bagels rise covered in an oiled bowl for 20 minutes.
9. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) and bring a pot of water to a boil.
10. Carefully drop the bagels into the boiling water one at a time.
11. Boil until they float to the surface of the water, about 30 seconds to 1 minute.
12. Remove the bagels from the water and immediately sprinkle with toppings (such as onion, garlic, sesame seeds, poppy seeds, and sea salt).
13. Place the bagels on a tray coated with cornmeal to prevent sticking.
14. Bake for approximately 25 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown and crispy.
This recipe can be made in about 1 1/2 hours from start to finish. It has been tried by friends who have never worked with yeast before and was very successful.
